braces_position.code:
<?php

$foo = new class { };

$bar = new class {
    public function test() {
        return true;
    }
};

single_class_element_per_statement.code:
<?php
final class Example
{
    const FOO_1 = 1, FOO_2 = 2;

    private static $bar1 = array(1,2,3), $bar2 = [1,2,3];
}

single_space_around_construct.code:
<?php

function foo() { yield  from  baz(); }

if ($foo) {
}
   elseif ($bar) {
}

fully_qualified_strict_types.code:
<?php

namespace Foo\Test;

class Foo extends \Other\BaseClass
{
    /** @var \Other\PropertyPhpDoc */
    private $array;

    public function __construct(\Other\PropertyPhpDoc $arg) {}
}

yoda_style.code:
<?php
    // Yoda style:
    if (null === $foo) {
        echo "null";
    }

    // Non-Yoda style:
    if ($bar === null) {
        echo "null";
    }

single_line_comment_style.code:
<?php
/* first comment */
$a = 1;

/*
 * second
 * comment
 */
$b = 2;

# third comment
$c = 3;

modifier_keywords.code:
<?php

abstract class ClassName
{
    const SAMPLE = 1;

    static protected int $beep;

    function zex() {}
}

class_attributes_separation.code:
<?php

enum Status: string
{
    case Active = 'active';

    case Inactive = 'inactive';

    case Pending = 'pending';
}

phpdoc_separation.code:
<?php
/**
 * @throws Exception|RuntimeException foo
 * @param string $foo
 *
 * @param bool   $bar Bar
 * @return int  Return the number of changes.
 */
